scope_note: QA Cattle Problem Bull Modular Structure cert [347]. Primary source: Iverson, B. (1993) Pythagorean Arithmetic Vol II, Chapter XVI pp.104-109. Equations: (1) W1=Y1+5/6·X1; (2) X1=Y1+9/20·Z1; (3) Z1=Y1+13/42·W1. Wurm's solution p.107: W1=2226, X1=1602, Y1=891, Z1=1580. (C1) Three bull equations satisfied exactly. (C2) X1≡0(mod 6); Z1≡0(mod 20); W1≡0(mod 42). (C3) Differences mod 5, 9, 13. (C4) 1/6·X1+11/20·Z1+29/42·W1=3·Y1. (C5) Individual remainders 267, 869, 1537. DOI: primary text, no external DOI.
